title: Neste Reports Strong 2025 Financials; Rotterdam Expansion to Boost SAF Production
content: Neste Corporation reported a strong financial turnaround in 2025, with comparable EBITDA rising to â‚¬1.68 billion. The fourth quarter was particularly robust, with EBITDA jumping to â‚¬601 million compared to â‚¬168 million in the prior year. This performance was driven by a successful improvement program that delivered â‚¬376 million in efficiencies and higher sales volumes in Renewable Products, which reached 4.1 million tons. CEO Heikki Malinen noted the year as a "turning point," highlighting improved market conditions and strong refining margins. The company is advancing its strategic expansion in Rotterdam, which will boost total renewable capacity to 6.8 million tons, optimally positioning the refinery to support growing Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) demand in Europe. Looking ahead to 2026, Neste expects stable Renewable Products sales volumes but lower Oil Products sales due to maintenance.
author: Analysts Account
